creator: AVShutko@mail.khstu.ru
text:
IServerd port (net-im/iserverd) was broken on 64-bit systems (unsigned long size increased from 4 to 8 bytes). This patch solve this problem. It should be applied after port existing patches (name "patch.ta" looks good)

Fix: Change unsigned long size defines in packet.cpp & tlv.cpp and some other files with "sizeof(unsigned long)" lines to immediate values (4).

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: Compile port under 64-bit system.
